dialogueChunks.intro: The supplies rolled in. The people who needed them came running before they could be unloaded.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The lead volunteer made it. Wounded but grinning. {target_npc} patched them up while they insisted on distributing the supplies first. {quest_ally} says there's enough to last if we're careful.
dialogueChunks.outro: Those volunteers walked into near-certain death for {quest_stakes_the}. And everyone safe tonight is proof they were right. Thank you, {player_name}.

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_focus_The} held through the worst of it. The volunteer climbed out shivering so hard they couldn't stand. They just pointed toward the families and asked if they were still safe.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They are. Every single one. {target_npc} carried the volunteer to the nearest hearth. The families they saved brought food, dry clothes, and quiet gratitude.
dialogueChunks.outro: Someone stood in danger all night because they couldn't bear to see their neighbors lose everything. And because you brought what they needed, {player_name}, they lived to see it through.

dialogueChunks.intro: Everyone made it. Every last one. The column arrived ragged, exhausted, and alive. The one who stayed behind... didn't make it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They held for nearly a full day before the {enemy_type_plural} realized it was one person. {quest_ally} says they went down fighting. {target_npc} is building a marker at the new settlement's entrance.
dialogueChunks.outro: They gave their people a future by giving up their own. And you made sure that future had a clear road, {player_name}. Their family is safe. That's what they wanted.
